{ "name": "symfony/process", "type": "library", "description": "Executes commands in sub-processes", "keywords": [], "homepage": "https://symfony.com", "license": "MIT", "authors": [ { "name": "Fabien Potencier", "email": "fabien@symfony.com" }, { "name": "Symfony Community", "homepage": "https://symfony.com/contributors" } ], "require": { "php": ">=8.2" }, "autoload": { "psr-4": { "Symfony\\Component\\Process\\": "" }, "exclude-from-classmap": [ "/Tests/" ] }, "minimum-stability": "dev" }
